HGSS.693.0001:
So, how about we exchange phone
numbers?[0200,0000]
HGSS.693.0002: Give me a call if you think of anything!
HGSS.693.0004:
Did you decide you wanted to
exchange phone numbers? [0200,0000]
HGSS.693.0005:
Uh-huh? Where are you calling from?\f
If you’re nearby, you might as well
come over and talk in person, you know?
HGSS.693.0006:
This is Sue!\f
How have you been since we last talked?\r
Are you doing a good job training your
Pokémon? We’re doing great!\f
[0100,000A,0000] is working hard.\f
You have a good Pokémon, too. After a
while, you’ll find it will become a\r
sensational partner! Hee hee!
HGSS.693.0007:
This is Sue!\f
How have you been since we spoke last?
Are your Pokémon winning their battles?\f
We’re doing great!
We even beat a wild [0100,000B,0000].\f
You have a good Pokémon, also.
All you need now is a great partner...\r
Know what I mean? Hee hee!
HGSS.693.0008:
This is Sue!\f
How have you been feeling since our
last talk? I’ve got many Pokémon... Ah!\f
Hello? This is Tim!
Let me talk on the phone... Wah!\f
Anyway, he let a wild [0100,000B,0000]
get away recently!\f
He sometimes says the strangest
things. He said he couldn’t compare\r
Pokémon with me, but... Ah!\f
Hello! This is Tim!
She is really... Wah!\f
Yeah, that’s just how it is, isn’t it!
I’ll leave it at that. We’ll call you\r
again later. Bye-bye!
HGSS.693.0009:
Hey, would you like to battle us again?\f
Sound good?\f
We’re waiting on [0104,0003,0000].
See you there!
HGSS.693.0010:
Hey, did you forget our promise?\f
I’m here with Tim, so I’m not getting
too bored, but still...\f
We’re waiting on [0104,0003,0000],
so please hurry.
HGSS.693.0011:
Hey, this is Sue!
I’m so, so, so bored right now.\f
Tim stepped out, but I expect
him to be back soon. That reminds me!\f
We recently saw a really amazing guy.\f
He was wearing a purple tuxedo and a
red bowtie. It looked great on him.\f
Oh--my boyfriend’s back!
Talk to you later!
